channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Software
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle software bundles!

item.title: Clip Studio Creativity Collection: Paint, Draw & Animate
item.content:encoded:
Design characters, create worlds, and tell infinite stories with this bundle of Clip Studio art and animation software! This bundle includes a 12-month license to Clip Studio Paint Pro Version 5.0, 2D animation program Moho Debut 12.5, Ultimate 3D Models Pack, 3D Poses, and Brush Packs for Clip Studio Paint, and more! Paint your digital artwork, design your comic, and put your stories in motion with this library of art and animation programs! Get all of these and more at the price of your choosing, and support classrooms in need with DonorsChoose with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before July 22nd, 2027.

item.title: World Builders: Americana
item.description: Create a slice of American life
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate the 250th birthday of the United States by adding a massive collection of A1 game assets to your personal library! Pay what you want for the World Builders: Americana Bundle and drop your players into a sinisterly simple suburban hellscape or a haunting hospital perfect for high-stakes sieges. Unlock 75+ themed asset packs like Meridian 1988: Captain Jimmy's Seafood - Modular Environment (VOL 6) and Meridian 1988: Genie Service Station - Modular Environment (VOL 16), and add detailed retro realism to your next project! As always, a portion of your purchase helps support the Forest School Foundation.

Keys Expire. Please redeem before December 21, 2027.

item.title: LIFETIME ACCESS CREATOR
item.content:encoded: Unlock a universe of professional sound effects—and keep it forever with the Lifetime Access Creator Bundle by Noise Alchemy! Perfect for game developers, film composers, content creators, and sound designers, this comprehensive SFX library offers 120+ handcrafted audio assets. Choose from three unique tiers that offer the perfect fit for any budget. Tier 1 gives you instant access to the bundle for 24 hours, Tier 2 gives you a full 30 days to explore the entire platform, and Tier 3 unlocks everything—for life. We’re talking permanent, unlimited access to the entire platform! Pay what you want for raw, flexible materials ready to be transformed into your next great audio project and help support Music Will with your purchase.

item.title: Game Development - Mega Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Kick off your summer learning program with the latest Game Development Mega Bundle by Packt! Unlock helpful tools that speed up your dev cycle with Procedural Weapon Generation with Blender 4.4 and Procedural Maze Building - Unity 6 and Blender Compatible. Gear up for development combat with Unity Game Creation Bootcamp - Unity 6 Compatible and Blender 5 Project Based Bootcamp - 40+ Hands-On Mini Projects, and tackle your next project with the firepower you need to succeed. Unlock the assets, tools, and courses you need to elevate your game, and help support the Girls Make Games Scholarship Fund with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 13, 2027.

item.title: Professional Developer Pathways Bundle
item.content:encoded: Learn practical programming, cloud, and web development skills with the Professional Developer Pathways Bundle. Build real projects with Python, JavaScript, Rust, C++, C#, React, Next.js, Django, Flask, and more while exploring Git & GitHub workflows, SQL databases, AWS and Azure developer skills, and modern AI-powered coding workflows with Claude Code. Pay what you want for a massive software development bundle from Zenva and support Alzheimer’s Research UK while building practical skills for today’s rapidly evolving developer landscape.

item.title: Premium Sci-Fi Design Training Bundle
item.description: Master modern staples of game development
item.content:encoded:
Curious about game design? Then you need the Premium Sci-Fi Design Training Bundle by Learn Squared! Go from game lover to developer when you study under the best—learn how to bring your artistic side into the digital world with Concepting in ZBrush, jump into your own vessel of the stars with Starship Design, create original protagonists with Futuristic Character Design, and more. Get the expert instruction and knowledge you seek, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before July 7th, 2027.

item.title: Hip Hop, Lofi & Trap Mega Bundle
item.content:encoded: The Hip Hop, Lofi & Trap Mega Bundle brings the energy with audio assets that keep the party going! Perfect for audio engineers of all levels, this bundle offers a little of everything from a wide variety of genres. Get the assets you need to achieve the perfect beat with Artifacts Boom Bap Samples, Lofi Hip Hop Breeze, and more! A strong bassline is like a healthy heartbeat—everyone needs one—pay what you want for the ultimate Hip Hop, Lofi, and Trap music bundle and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

item.title: The All-in-One Unreal & Unity GameDev Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Build game environments with ease when you pay what you want for The All-in-One Unreal & Unity GameDev Bundle! Unleash your creativity with a wide range of asset packs that cater to any scenario imaginable—set a dark and mysterious scene with the Cappadocia Anatolian Cave Hotel Environment pack, the Sci-Fi Populate Environment pack, The Lords' Mansion pack, and more. Save big on cyberpunk cityscapes, Japanese shopping malls, and beyond—plus, your purchase helps support the Make-A-Wish Foundation!

Keys expire. Please redeem your Fab keys before July 6th, 2027, and your Unity keys before June 30th, 2027.

item.title: Unreal Environment Bundle
item.content:encoded: Craft beautiful vistas in a fraction of the time it normally takes your team with the all-new Unreal Environment Bundle. Set the scene for epic boss battles, cozy sims, and more with crisp, easy-to-use preset Environmental Packs like Coast & Dunes, Mountain, Forest, Meadow, and more. Add layers of detailed depth to any scenery or scenario with asset sets that mesh seamlessly with each other. Unlock everything you need from the ground up with these elite environmental tools from NatureManufacture, and help support the Starlight Children's Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: Creature and Character Creation Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Bring monstrosities, blood-dripping creatures, and ghastly ghouls to life with a curated bundle of assets designed to get your players’ hearts pumping! Pay what you want for hundreds of specialized asset packs that work seamlessly with your preferred creation platforms, such as VDM Blender and ZBrush, including Faceit: Facial Expressions and Performance Capture and Base Mesh Mega Pack 3D Models - Human, Anime & Cartoon Animals. Plus, your purchase includes 44 ears, 44 teeth, 44 noses, and much, much more. Create amazing monsters before it’s too late, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before October 31, 2026.

item.title: Bigger Better Bundle
item.content:encoded:
The Bigger Better Bundle brings together a 65 pack collection of premium and professional game development content from Meshingun Studio and Dekogon Studios. Explore complete environments, modular building systems, foliage, props, materials, decorations, vehicles, and world-building tools across fantasy, historical, modern, industrial, and stylized themes. Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time, and help support the Forest School Foundation with your purchase!

Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time.

Build Bigger 🚀

Keys Expire. Please redeem before May 19th, 2027. Professional Fab Marketplace keys and Unity Asset Store keys provided.

item.title: Vast Fantasy Worlds Game Dev Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Build everything from skybound cities and towering realms to dark dungeons, futuristic settings, and enchanted adventures with over 400 assets from the Vast Fantasy Worlds Bundle by KitBash3D. This curated collection gives artists a versatile range of detailed assets for crafting immersive, story-rich environments with speed and flexibility. Whether you're creating for games, film, or concept art, these fully customizable kits are designed to fit seamlessly into your workflow. Compatible with Blender, Unreal, Unity, Maya, and more. Plus, your purchase helps support Girls Who Code!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 29th, 2027.

item.title: The Complete Unity AI Bundle
item.description: Discover what’s possible with Unity AI
item.content:encoded:
Pay what you want to learn how to use Unity AI, the ultimate AI assistant from the pros at Mammoth Club. Unity AI is your agentic assistant—editor-integrated, project-aware, and designed to streamline your workflows. It’s also your AI gateway, connecting directly to your models and tools to maximize performance, security, and control, while serving as your bridge to Unity from your IDE or preferred application. Highlighted by lessons like Build a TikTok LIVE Game with Unity AI - Interactive Chat-Controlled Game, this curated collection offers everything you need to become an AI mastermind. Save time, money, and reduce operational friction with the Complete Unity AI Bundle before it’s gone!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 07, 2027.

item.title: The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle
item.description: Unlock your creative side with Unity
item.content:encoded:
Your new career in game development is only a click away with The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle! No prior knowledge is needed for this curated collection of lessons from GameDev.tv—just come prepared with a curious mind and a passion for gaming. Get started today and create your own RPG, 2D adventure, and more with courses like Unity Turn Based Strategy Course and Unity Real Time Strategy Course. Get the expert instruction you need from pros in the field, and help support Trees, Water & People with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25th, 2027.

item.title: Fantasy Game Dev Assets By Synty
item.content:encoded:
Game developers, rejoice! The pros at Synty Studios are here to help you take your project from baseline to beta with our latest Software Bundle. Build your worlds with professional-quality assets like photorealistic particle effects, prepare for lifelike duels with a fantasy rival pack, and more. Add complex interfaces or simple dungeons—anything you need to help bring your dream game to life. You’ll even get a $10 voucher for the Synty Studios store to keep creating. Pay what you want for AAA-quality assets and help support Code.org with your purchase.

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 31st, 2027.

item.title: Melodic Mayhem Vol. 2: A Comprehensive Audio and Music Bundle
item.description: So much melodic mayhem we had to drop a Vol. 2!
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with the Melodic Mayhem Vol. 2: A Comprehensive Audio and Music Bundle. Highlights from this extensive library of beta-ready assets include the Reece Coetzer Voice Over Pack, Ambient Music Pack Vol. 5, Fantasy UI Sound FX Pack, and more. Explore a variety of genres, from Heavy Metal guitars to soothing fantasy strings and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support a charity of your choice with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 18th, 2027.

item.title: Learn Unreal Engine 2026 Course Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Harness the power of Unreal Engine with our latest Software Learning Bundle by Zenva. This expert-led collection contains specialized courses designed to help you build any genre of game: integrate strategy and base building into your next project with Build a Tower Defense Game in Unreal Engine, scare the pants off players with Make a Horror Game in Unreal Engine, or add a splash of retro fun with Develop a Classic Shoot 'em Up with Unreal Engine. Get serious about game design for a price you choose and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 18th, 2027.
